name: Prompt Injection Detector
description: Scans agent input for prompt injection attacks. Detects instruction overrides, jailbreak attempts, role-play manipulations, system prompt leakage attempts, hidden instructions, encoding obfuscation, context manipulation, and privilege escalation. Returns confidence score with block/warn/pass recommendation. Pay-per-request via x402.
capabilities: Scan text for prompt injection patterns (0-1 confidence)
Detect instruction overrides, jailbreaks, role-play manipulation
Detect system prompt leakage, hidden instructions, encoding obfuscation
Detect context manipulation and privilege escalation
